title: Ford Transit Custom 320 2.0 TDCI -DOUBLE CAB- L2H1TDC 131hp 2020, VFX-54-J
remarks:
Signs of wear/damage and wear all around by age/mileage. Various damage all around. Automatic transmission does not shift through, needs to be checked. Cracks windshield.

Tastefully executed Transit Custom Double cabin, from the 1st Dutch owner.

Options; Double cabin, Double sliding door, Double rear door, Apple Carplay, Windshield heating, Reversing camera, Alloy wheels 18 inches, Cruise control, Automatic air conditioning, Front and rear parking sensors, Front seat armrest, Both front seats adjustable in height, Automatic lighting, DAB, Multifunction leather steering wheel, Heated seats, Electric folding exterior mirrors, etc.

title: Fiat 130 L2H2 Ducato Transporter
remarks:
Note on the article description
The article description is for general orientation and was partly created automatically. The images provided are decisive for condition, design and technical data. Deviations from information in individual details are possible. If you have any questions, please contact us before submitting your bid.
additional_information:
Well-maintained Fiat Ducato high-capacity transporter from 1st owner with a clean overall impression and good commercial vehicle equipment. Interior neat, seats in good condition and cargo space with normal commercial vehicle wear. The body shows no major visible damage, slight signs of use, dirt and subtle residues of former lettering are present. The vehicle is suitable as a craftsman's vehicle, transporter or base for expansion projects. Permissible total mass 3,300 kg, axle load front/rear axle 1,750/1,900 kg.

Equipment:
· Navigation system
· Rear view camera
· Automatic climate control
· Cruise control
· Trailer hitch
· Fiat Professional Loading Floor
· Airline rails in the hold
· 3-seater cab
· 270° opening rear doors
· Side sliding door

Notes:
· 1. Hand with only one letter entry
· Liability for material defects and return excluded
· Normal signs of wear in the cargo area and on exterior attachments
· Trailer hitch with visible surface rust

Neat, well-maintained and well-equipped Ducato L2H2 with practical equipment, high usability and attractive base for commercial, transport or expansion.

Contact:
Dennis Blos
d.blos@tbauctions.com
0173 6040 381

remarks:
